vocab.meaning: chức năng sinh lý tối ưu
vocab.example: I prioritize high-quality protein and micronutrients to maintain optimal physiological function and metabolic health.

vocab.meaning: hoạt động thể chất cường độ mạnh
vocab.example: Engaging in vigorous physical activity at least thrice a week is a non-negotiable part of my fitness routine.

vocab.meaning: sự cân bằng giữa tâm trí và cơ thể
vocab.example: Practicing yoga helps me achieve a state of mind-body equilibrium, reducing stress and improving flexibility simultaneously.

vocab.meaning: sự đầy đủ về mặt dinh dưỡng
vocab.example: I consult a nutritionist occasionally to ensure my plant-based diet meets the requirements for nutritional sufficiency.

vocab.meaning: ngăn chặn các bệnh mãn tính
vocab.example: A lifestyle rich in antioxidants and low in processed sugars is vital to stave off chronic diseases in the long run.

vocab.meaning: vệ sinh giấc ngủ (thói quen để có giấc ngủ ngon)
vocab.example: I strictly follow a sleep hygiene protocol, such as avoiding blue light before bed, to ensure I wake up feeling rejuvenated.

vocab.meaning: bài tập ít tác động lực (nhẹ nhàng cho khớp)
vocab.example: For those with joint issues, low-impact exercise like swimming or cycling is an excellent way to stay fit.
Keeping healthy isn't just about the body; building mental fortitude through meditation is equally paramount.

vocab.meaning: có hại cho sức khỏe/sự an lạc của ai đó
vocab.example: I've realized that chronic stress is incredibly detrimental to one’s well-being, so I’ve started prioritizing relaxation.

vocab.word: attain a high level of fitness
vocab.meaning: đạt được mức độ thể chất cao
vocab.example: It took months of disciplined training to attain a high level of fitness suitable for running a half-marathon.
